{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323055510F7AFFA5409645763117C\"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7482664527822701337","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很生动，很透彻，很受启发"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742199276,"group_id":"7412472013148654617","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyI//JKwhelKt4oYfp2HD3ay9uRfRCXCd3tqsEm1IU5Z","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3277008131857239","user_name":"牛逼牛逼的八田美咲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3277008131857239","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7412472013148654617","book_info":{"abstract":"陈兰在经历了二十年自认为平静而幸福的婚姻生活中，在人到中年时，大儿子已经高考准备上大学，小女儿也即将进入小学阶段，她认为自己终于可以松一口气的时候。这个炎热的暑假，老公李允沛给她狠狠的上了婚姻的一堂课，平时两口子都为了自己的小家，聚少离多。陈兰一个人在家又当妈又当爹陪伴两个孩子，家里面很多事情都没有跟老公进行报怨，当然也有很多家里的事情还没有跟老公商量，就自行决定做好后，再跟老公说一说就行。结果这样的情况，让他们的婚姻产生了破裂，老公性格不合，生产感到压抑提出两人分开过。这对于陈兰这样一个普通的妇女来说，听到这样的话让她想不通了，她想搞清楚如同小说里或电视剧的情节为什么会出现在自己的生活中，在些过程中，她也学习了很多，也改变了很多，婚姻生活需要经营，两个人也需要经常 的沟通，才能让自己的婚姻生活可以变得持续有活力。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od8e1da040998e222f74b979fb796d390~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"午时辰","author_id":"","book_id":"7412472013148654617","book_name":"中年现实婚姻","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":750,\"name\":\"职场婚恋\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750\u0026name=职场婚恋\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":3,\"name\":\"现代言情\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3\u0026name=现代言情\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7412509965975306777","read_count":"263","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"101542"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"85","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2od8e1da040998e222f74b979fb796d390~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779400510\u0026x-signature=PkQrD1fIctYpX1u0V%2FcEFvffIe4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2469975124353120","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"115"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323055510F7AFFA5409645763117C\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5727,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18797,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":208},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7559209034612704025","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"才开始听，觉得很真实"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760017572,"group_id":"74124720131486
